html:
Peer Assessment 1: you must review the code submissions of five classmates and provide structured feedback on each one.

Grading rubric:

  • Correctness (does the code produce the expected output?)
  • Readability (are variable names meaningful? is the code well-structured?)
  • Use of OOP principles (are classes and access modifiers used appropriately?)

Deadline for submitting your reviews: see the course schedule. Both steps (submitting your own code and completing your reviews) are required to receive a grade.
